name: bior-platform
description: BioR - Biological Response Network Platform. D1 Database + Real JWT Auth + Full CRUD.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:node
scripts.deploy: bash deploy-guard.sh bior && npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name bior
scripts.deploy:bior: bash deploy-guard.sh bior && npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name bior
scripts.deploy:TABLETAP_BLOCKED: echo '!! BLOCKED — This is the BioR project. Deploy TableTap from /home/user/webapp instead !!' && exit 1
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
